headlines.title: Republican Steve Hilton to face Democrat Xavier Becerra in California governor’s race
headlines.description: NBC News projected Tuesday that Hilton, a former Fox News host, will advance from a crowded all-party primary field to the general election.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Pamela Evette advances to GOP primary runoff against Alan Wilson in South Carolina governor’s race
headlines.description: South Carolina Lt. Gov. Pamela Evette and state Attorney General Alan Wilson advanced to a Republican primary runoff in the race to be the state’s next governor, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham wins GOP primary, defeating wealthy challenger in South Carolina
headlines.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham has won his Republican primary in South Carolina, NBC News projects, after spending millions to secure the nomination.

headlines.title: More than $200 million later, Tom Steyer’s second bid for elected office is done
headlines.description: Billionaire climate activist Tom Steyer’s bid for governor of California is the second time he’s spent more than nine figures in an unsuccessful attempt to win public office.

headlines.title: Steve Hilton advances to the general election in California governor's race
headlines.description: Former Fox News host Steve Hilton has advanced to the general election in the California gubernatorial race, NBC News projects, where he will face former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Becerra.

headlines.title: U.S. launches ‘self-defense strikes’ against Iran after downing of helicopter
headlines.description: Centcom said it carried out a ‘proportional response to unjustified Iranian aggression’ after President Trump said the Iranian regime shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter. Two crew members were rescued by an unmanned drone boat. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Michigan is ‘ready’ if administration sends federal agents to November polls: Lieutenant governor
headlines.description: Michigan Lieutenant Governor Garlin Gilchrist (D) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss his decision to run for secretary of state. Lt. Gov. Gilchrist also reacts to President Trump’s claims of voter fraud in California.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Republicans pass bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol through the end of Trump’s term
headlines.description: The legislation, passed only with Republican votes after Democrats demanded reforms to the immigration agencies, now heads to President Trump for his signature.

headlines.title: Trump’s elevating Bill Pulte as intelligence chief could mean FISA spy power expires
headlines.description: FISA Section 702, a powerful surveillance tool, faces a risk of expiring this week after President Donald Trump named Bill Pulte as acting national intelligence director.

headlines.title: Why Graham Platner’s margin matters in Maine: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

headlines.title: Vance refers Walz and Minnesota attorney general to DOJ for fraud investigation
headlines.description: The Justice Department opened a separate investigation this year into the Democratic governor over allegations he helped impede immigration enforcement.
